Furthermore, the "FBI and NSA issue joint 'warning' of Iran-linked cyberattacks on critical infrastructure," indicating an active and evolving threat landscape beyond kinetic conflict.

Pillar_Narratives.Sovereign Financial Stress: Central banks are actively monitoring the geopolitical situation, with the "RBI holds repo rate, warns of impact of West Asia conflict on economy." Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: While "global markets surge" post-ceasefire, offering some temporary relief, the overall environment remains susceptible to pressure. Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: Regulatory disagreements persist, as seen with "US carmakers accuse EU of blocking supersised pick-up trucks from roads," indicating ongoing fragmentation in international trade policies. Pillar_Narratives.Cyber & Infrastructure Threats: This pillar remains a critical concern, with "Iran-Linked Hackers Target US Industrial Sites, Attempt To Erase Data" reported by authorities.
